## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GrowthX's AI-assisted content creation services to Obsidian Security for potential partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/MoaApHsZHifxQ8wC3Qyws77ffaZmdVHv?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers an end-to-end AI-augmented content creation system with human expertise, focusing on high-quality, SEO-optimized content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/MoaApHsZHifxQ8wC3Qyws77ffaZmdVHv?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
  - [The process includes an 8-week strategy phase ($20k) followed by a 12-month growth execution phase (starting at $15k/month)](https://fathom.video/share/MoaApHsZHifxQ8wC3Qyws77ffaZmdVHv?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)
  - [Obsidian Security is interested but wants their SEO manager to review the offering before making a decision](https://fathom.video/share/MoaApHsZHifxQ8wC3Qyws77ffaZmdVHv?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Content Creation Approach

  - [Utilizes AI-assisted workflows with human expertise to create high-quality, SEO-optimized content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/MoaApHsZHifxQ8wC3Qyws77ffaZmdVHv?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
  - [Focuses on creating comprehensive, nuanced content that addresses long-tail topics and user intent](https://fathom.video/share/MoaApHsZHifxQ8wC3Qyws77ffaZmdVHv?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Integrates with platforms like Webflow for seamless publishing](https://fathom.video/share/MoaApHsZHifxQ8wC3Qyws77ffaZmdVHv?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
  - [Emphasizes fact-checking, citing reputable sources, and maintaining content freshness](https://fathom.video/share/MoaApHsZHifxQ8wC3Qyws77ffaZmdVHv?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)

### Content Strategy and Execution

  - [Begins with an 8-week strategy phase to set up the platform, create context, and craft content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/MoaApHsZHifxQ8wC3Qyws77ffaZmdVHv?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)
  - [Transitions to a 12-month growth execution phase with daily publishing, graphics, SEO optimization, and AI visibility monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/MoaApHsZHifxQ8wC3Qyws77ffaZmdVHv?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [Identifies content opportunities by analyzing competitors and market gaps (e.g., 68,000+ potential topics for Obsidian)](https://fathom.video/share/MoaApHsZHifxQ8wC3Qyws77ffaZmdVHv?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [Aims to improve search rankings and increase citations in AI-generated answers](https://fathom.video/share/MoaApHsZHifxQ8wC3Qyws77ffaZmdVHv?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)

### Quality Assurance and Competitive Edge

  - [Uses agentic workflows to ensure high-quality research and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/MoaApHsZHifxQ8wC3Qyws77ffaZmdVHv?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [Maintains separate teams for companies in similar spaces to prevent data sharing](https://fathom.video/share/MoaApHsZHifxQ8wC3Qyws77ffaZmdVHv?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
  - [Does not train models on client data, ensuring unique content for each client](https://fathom.video/share/MoaApHsZHifxQ8wC3Qyws77ffaZmdVHv?tab=summary&timestamp=1521.0)
  - [Focuses on creating content that adds value and avoids AI-generated content penalties](https://fathom.video/share/MoaApHsZHifxQ8wC3Qyws77ffaZmdVHv?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)

### Pricing and Commitment Structure

  - [8-week strategy phase: One-time $20,000 fee](https://fathom.video/share/MoaApHsZHifxQ8wC3Qyws77ffaZmdVHv?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)
  - [12-month growth execution phase: Starting at $15,000 per month](https://fathom.video/share/MoaApHsZHifxQ8wC3Qyws77ffaZmdVHv?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
  - [Includes daily publishing, graphics, SEO optimization, AI visibility monitoring, and reporting](https://fathom.video/share/MoaApHsZHifxQ8wC3Qyws77ffaZmdVHv?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send meeting recording to Tina](https://fathom.video/share/MoaApHsZHifxQ8wC3Qyws77ffaZmdVHv?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
  - [Schedule a demo/deep dive with Obsidian's SEO manager next week](https://fathom.video/share/MoaApHsZHifxQ8wC3Qyws77ffaZmdVHv?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)
  - [GrowthX to send a standard proposal to Obsidian](https://fathom.video/share/MoaApHsZHifxQ8wC3Qyws77ffaZmdVHv?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)
  - [Marcel to organize a CMO event in the Palo Alto area before year-end](https://fathom.video/share/MoaApHsZHifxQ8wC3Qyws77ffaZmdVHv?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)
